title: TF2 Mobs
description: Brings characters from Team Fortress 2 into Minecraft
body:
## Summary
Characters from the shooter game Team Fortress 2 are now in the world of Minecraft. Still, RED and BLU continue to wage their meaningless war over the land by the hands of the nine distinct mercenaries. If you, the player, are willing to join this fight, get ready for both challenge and opportunity.

Most aspects of the mod are configurable, so make sure to check the config.



**Requires [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)**



## Progression
**Team Tablet** is the most important item of this mod. Craft and open it to join a team to be able to encounter mercenaries that you can hire or fight. 

Equip your mercenaries with armor and give them orders. Make them protect your home, take them on adventure or do anything you like with them. Craft sentries, dispensers, teleporters and other stuff to strengthen you and your team. Fight the opposing team to obtain rare and useful items.

Obtain **australium** by mining in Badlands biomes above y=32. This material can be used to craft various stuff. It is also needed for crafting **Australium Transmitter**, which is required for summoning the boss of the mod: **Saxton Hale**. Defeat him for a unique drop.



## Main content list

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Hireable and highly intelligent **mercenaries** that will aid or challenge you in battle. Almost all of them have useful **drops**

**Sentry**: upgradable and easily operatable automatic turret

**Dispenser**: your universal healing and feeding relocatable station

**Teleporter**: lets you travel between 2 teleporters instantly withing single dimension

**Saxton Hale**: an epic but goofy boss with many attacks and smooth animations. Drops useful and unique rewards

**Team banner**. A creative mode item for creating endless spectacular mob battles with the mercenaries

</details>





## Info
No Fabric  

1.21.1 port is planned but I have to polish the 1.20.1 version first

You may include this mod in a modpack without asking as long as your modpack is not paywalled 





**_All sounds used in this mod are made by and belong to Valve Corporation_**
